__inputs.name: DS_MARIADB
__inputs.label: Gameplay Analytics MariaDB
__inputs.description: MariaDB datasource pointing at the Canary database with schema/gameplay_analytics_views.sql applied.

title: Gameplay Analytics
description: Vocation balance, DPS/EXP/loot performance and Analytics pipeline health. Long-range panels read daily aggregates (analytics_daily_balance); drill-down panels read raw sessions and are intended for short time ranges only.

list.name: vocation_id
list.label: Vocation
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT vocation_id AS __text, vocation_id AS __value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics ORDER BY vocation_id

list.name: hunt_area
list.label: Hunt area
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT hunt_area AS __text, hunt_area AS __value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE hunt_area <> '' ORDER BY hunt_area

list.name: server_version
list.label: Server version
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT server_version AS __text, server_version AS __value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE server_version <> '' ORDER BY server_version

panels.title: EXP/h by vocation, level bracket, hunt area and server version
panels.description: Daily aggregate. Grouped by vocation, level bracket, hunt area and server version; each combination is its own series.

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id, ' L', level_bracket, '+ ', hunt_area, ' ', server_version) AS metric, exp_per_hour AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

panels.title: DPS, damage taken/s and healing/s
panels.description: Daily aggregate, filtered by the same vocation/hunt/server-version variables.

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id, ' dps') AS metric, dps AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id, ' damage taken/s') AS metric, damage_taken_per_second AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id, ' healing/s') AS metric, healing_per_second AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id) AS metric, deaths_per_100_sessions AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

panels.title: Solo versus party: EXP/h
panels.description: party_size_weighted / party_weight_seconds <= 1 is classified solo, otherwise party.

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id, ' ', mode) AS metric, exp_per_hour AS value FROM analytics_daily_party_mode_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id) AS metric, shared_experience_percent AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

panels.title: Profit and supply cost per hour (NPC value)
panels.description: Market-value profit is not shown: the engine has no trustworthy Lua-accessible market price source, so loot_value_market is currently always 0 (see docs/systems/gameplay-analytics-supply-loot.md).

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id, ' npc profit/h') AS metric, npc_profit_per_hour AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

SELECT session_date AS time, CONCAT('voc ', vocation_id, ' supply cost/h') AS metric, supply_cost_per_hour AS value FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) AND sessions >= $min_sessions ORDER BY session_date

panels.title: Session counts and minimum sample-size warning
panels.description: Rows below the Minimum sample size variable are unreliable for balance decisions; the Sessions column is not filtered out so low-sample groups stay visible for context.

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date, vocation_id, level_bracket, hunt_area, server_version, sessions FROM analytics_daily_vocation_metrics WHERE session_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) AND hunt_area IN ($hunt_area) AND server_version IN ($server_version) ORDER BY sessions ASC LIMIT 200

panels.title: Spell efficiency
panels.description: Drill-down panel reading analytics_session_spells directly (spell detail is not part of the daily aggregate). Keep the dashboard time range short (hours, not months) when viewing this panel; it is not a long-range panel.

targets.rawSql: SELECT vocation_id, spell_name, SUM(casts) AS casts, ROUND(SUM(damage) / NULLIF(SUM(casts), 0)) AS damage_per_cast, ROUND(SUM(healing) / NULLIF(SUM(casts), 0)) AS healing_per_cast, ROUND((SUM(damage) + SUM(healing)) / NULLIF(SUM(mana_spent), 0), 2) AS output_per_mana FROM analytics_spell_efficiency_drilldown WHERE started_at BETWEEN $__unixEpochFrom() AND $__unixEpochTo() AND vocation_id IN ($vocation_id) GROUP BY vocation_id, spell_name HAVING SUM(casts) >= 20 ORDER BY output_per_mana DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Pending dead-letter sessions
panels.description: MariaDB-backed: real, persisted dead-letter rows awaiting a retried write. Queue depth, in-flight retry count and last flush duration are process-local runtime counters with no MariaDB representation; check the in-game "/analytics status" command for those.

targets.rawSql: SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(oldest_failure_at) AS oldest_failure_at FROM analytics_dead_letter_health

options.content:
Queue depth, in-flight retry counts and last-flush duration are **process-local runtime counters** (see `docs/systems/gameplay-analytics.md`, "Administrative commands"). They reset on restart and are not written to MariaDB, so they cannot be charted from this MariaDB-only dashboard. Check them with:

```
/analytics status
```

Dead-letter counts to the left *are* persisted and safe to chart here.
